summary: Updated public account-entry and account-adjacent copy for Shape A local-only v1. The entry chips no longer advertise Backup, Sync, or Caregiver sharing; account-disabled/unconfigured surfaces now plainly say accounts are not set up in this build yet; nearby auth/account/invite copy avoids promising backup, multi-device pickup, shared logs, or caregiver visibility.
notes: No sync, backup, or caregiver-sharing feature was built.
Future feature code was preserved; only public copy and smoke guards changed.
New smoke check AE8 guards against reintroducing the stale account-entry Backup / Sync / Caregiver sharing claims.
